world.title: European Parliament Urges Indonesia to Probe Acid Attacks Against Activists
world.description: The European Parliament has urged the Indonesian Government to end legal immunity or impunity for human rights violators.

world.title: Locals near epicenter of the Ebola crisis express fear and concerns about misinformation
world.description: Hélène Akilimali says she’s taking every precaution against contracting Ebola, including always wearing a face mask in public. But her work as a cocoa seller in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) - the epicenter of the latest outbreak - brings her into daily contact with other people, some of whom doubt the disease is even real, and she has no control over how they behave.

world.title: West Nile Caucus pushes for bigger share in 12th P
world.description: Speaking on May 32, 2026, at Parliament, the chairperson of the West Nile Parliamentary Caucus and Obongi County MP, Hassan Kaps Fungaroo, said on behalf of the caucus that the region has a long history of service and remains committed to contributing to Uganda’s social, political and economic development.

world.title: Alleged sexual misconduct case involving teacher in Setiu under probe
world.description: KUALA TERENGGANU: An alleged sexual misconduct case involving a teacher at a school in Setiu, which went viral on social media, is being investigated by the Integrity Unit of the Education Ministry.

world.title: Hull woman with brain cancer remortgages her home to help pay for pioneering treatment
world.description: 'There’s been no regrowth but I’m not in remission and there is no cure - and it's cost around £100,000 for treatment so far'

world.title: Trump says deal 'negotiated' but Iran disputes terms
world.description: A "largely negotiated" memorandum of understanding on an Iran peace deal would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, US President Donald Trump has said although the Iranian Fars news agency disputed that claim.

world.title: Knicks playing devastating brand of basketball - and can beat anyone right now
world.description: By the end, the Knicks had done more than beat the Cavaliers: they’d ruined them. By the end, worn out by one more beating – this one a wire-to-wire 121-108 beaty – the Cavaliers just stopped playing offense. They stopped playing defense.

world.title: School, residential buildings hit as Russia pounds Ukraine capital Kyiv with missiles, drones; 4 dead
